name: Premium Toor Dal
description: Unpolished, 100% natural, and protein-rich Premium Toor Dal. Best for daily healthy meals.

name: Superfine Daily Rice
description: Premium superfine grains, non-sticky and lightweight. Perfect for your everyday home-cooked meals.

name: Royal Long Grain Basmati Rice
description: Extra-long slender grains with rich aroma. Universally aged to perfection, ideal for special biryanis and pulao.

name: Organic Moong Dal
description: 100% organic, unpolished, and high-protein yellow moong dal. Sourced naturally and highly easy to digest.

name: Premium Toor Dal
description: Traditional unpolished Arhar Dal processed with care. High nutritious value and rich traditional taste.

name: Premium Whole Masoor Dal
description: Finest grade red masoor lentils, rich in iron and dietary fiber. Fast cooking and delicious flavor.

name: Premium Mustard Oil
description: 100% pure cold-pressed mustard oil, rich in flavor and natural aroma.

name: Refined White Sugar
description: Sulphur-free double refined sugar, clean and high sweetness.

name: Premium Sharbati Wheat Grains
description: Selected golden Sharbati wheat grains, high in nutrition and fiber.

name: Fresh Chakki Atta
description: 100% whole wheat stone-ground chakki atta, perfect for soft and healthy rotis.
